title: Chainsaw Man: DevilCraft
description: A Minecraft mod inspired by Chainsaw Man, adding devils, weapons, and brutal combat.
body:
**⚠ This mod requires GeckoLib!**

This is a fan-made Minecraft mod inspired by Chainsaw Man, bringing dark devils, blood, and transformation mechanics into the Minecraft world.

Fight against terrifying enemies, experience bleeding effects,
and transform into something beyond human.

![Chainsawman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b47676508dabdac73434c0c93865c80231f8d0d_0.webp)

## Mobs
- Pochita
- Tomato Devil
- Gun Devil

## Items
- Chainsaw Man's Head  
- Chainsaw  
- Bread  
- Strongest Bread  

## Links
